rules.note: passing にするには、検証コマンドを実際に実行し、その出力（exit code 含む）を evidence に貼ること。『成功した』という文章だけでは passing にしない（未検証passの誘発を防ぐ）。verification は合格条件を一意に書く。

status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: The verification command was actually run and its output (incl. exit code) is recorded in evidence.

features.title: Create a new conversation
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can click New Chat and see a fresh empty conversation.
verification: PASS CONDITION: a new conversation row appears in the sidebar AND the main panel shows the empty-conversation state. If either is missing, this is NOT passing.
evidence: (記入見本 — 実タスク登録時に消す) passing にするときは、実際に実行したコマンドと出力をそのまま貼る。例: `$ npm run check` → `tsc --noEmit` exit 0 / `$ npm test` → 14 passed, 0 failed, exit 0。目視検証なら手順と観察結果を具体的に。『成功した』だけは不可。

features.title: Send a message in the current conversation
features.user_visible_behavior: A user can submit a message and see it appear in the active thread.
verification: Type a message into the input and submit.
PASS CONDITION: the submitted message text appears as a new entry in the thread. Verify the exact text, not just that the thread changed.

features.title: Persist the active conversation list
features.user_visible_behavior: A user sees previously created conversations after restarting the app.
verification: Fully restart the app (not just reload).
PASS CONDITION: both conversations still appear in the sidebar after restart. One surviving is NOT passing.
